    },

      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Apakah TOTO80 menyediakan pasaran situs togel terlengkap?",

        "text": "Ya, sebagai situs togel terpopuler, TOTO80 menyediakan berbagai pasaran togel resmi internasional terlengkap dengan proses transaksi yang super cepat."

      }
    },

      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Apakah bermain di situs toto togel TOTO80 dijamin aman?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Tentu saja. TOTO80 merupakan situs toto berlisensi resmi yang memberikan jaminan keamanan data serta pembayaran penuh atas setiap kemenangan member."

    <style>
        .brand-neue-button {
            gap: var(--spacing-2x);
            border-radius: var(--roundness-subtle);
            background: var(--color-interactive-primary);
            color: var(--color-content-brand);
            font-family: PolySans-Median;
            font-size: var(--font-size-2x);
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 0 20px;
        }
        
        .brand-neue-button:hover,
        .brand-neue-button:active,
        .brand-neue-button:focus {
            background: var(--color-interactive-primary-hover);
        }

            font-size: 0;

  --transition-easing-ease-out: cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.58, 1);
  --font-family-wide: "PolySansWide", "PolySans", "Inter", -apple-system, "BlinkMacSystemFont",
    "Segoe UI", "Fira Sans", "Helvetica Neue", "Arial", sans-serif;
  --font-family-regular: "PolySans", "Inter", -apple-system, "BlinkMacSystemFont", "Segoe UI",
    "Fira Sans", "Helvetica Neue", "Arial", sans-serif;
  --font-family-monospace: "Courier New", monospace;
  --font-size-10x: 6rem;

  --font-size-6x: 1.875rem;
  --font-size-5x: 1.5rem;

  --font-size-3x: 1rem;
  --font-size-2x: 0.875rem;
  --font-size-1x: 0.75rem;
  --font-weight-bulky: 700;
  --font-weight-median: 600;
  --font-weight-neutral: 400;

  --font-spacing-normal: 0;
  --font-spacing-loose: 0.02em;

  --icon-size-2x: 24px;

.color-scheme-light {
  --color-interactive-primary: var(--color-green-100);
  --color-interactive-primary-hover: var(--color-green-300);
  --color-interactive-secondary: var(--color-transparent);
  --color-interactive-secondary-hover: var(--color-grey-1000);
  --color-interactive-tertiary: var(--color-transparent);
  --color-interactive-tertiary-hover: var(--color-grey-25);
  --color-interactive-control: var(--color-grey-1000);
  --color-interactive-control-hover: var(--color-grey-700);
  --color-interactive-disabled: var(--color-grey-100);
  --color-surface-primary: var(--color-white);
  --color-surface-accent: var(--color-grey-50);
  --color-surface-inverse: var(--color-grey-1000);
  --color-surface-brand-accent: var(--color-jaffa-25);
  --color-surface-elevated: var(--color-grey-700);
  --color-surface-caution-default: var(--color-jaffa-25);
  --color-surface-caution-strong: var(--color-jaffa-700);
  --color-surface-critical-default: var(--color-veryberry-25);
  --color-surface-critical-strong: var(--color-veryberry-700);
  --color-surface-info-default: var(--color-blue-25);
  --color-surface-info-strong: var(--color-blue-700);
  --color-surface-neutral-default: var(--color-grey-25);
  --color-surface-neutral-strong: var(--color-grey-1000);
  --color-surface-positive-default: var(--color-green-25);
  --color-surface-positive-strong: var(--color-green-700);

/*# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64, */</style><style>.brand-neue-button {
  gap: var(--spacing-2x);
  border-radius: var(--roundness-subtle);
  background: var(--color-interactive-primary);

  text-align: center;
  padding: 0 20px;
}
.brand-neue-button:hover, .brand-neue-button:active, .brand-neue-button:focus {
  background: var(--color-interactive-primary-hover);
}

<div class="wb-panel" id="winnerBoard">
<div class="wb-head">
    <div class="wb-trophy" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
        <path d="M8 6h8v2a4 4 0 0 0 4-4H4a4 4 0 0 0 4 4V6Z" fill="#06233f"/>
        <path d="M8 6v3a4 4 0 0 0 8 0V6M10 14h4v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2H8a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-3Z" stroke="#06233f" stroke-width="1.4"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="wb-title">Pemenang Toto Togel</div>
    <div class="wb-dot" title="Live"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="wb-list-wrap">
    <ul class="wb-track" id="wbTrack">
      </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="wb-foot">
    UPDATE WINNER TOTO TOGEL
    <span class="wb-pill">LIVE RESULT</span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  // ---------- Asset avatar biru untuk user ----------
  const AVATARS = [
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-01&backgroundColor=0ea5e9",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-02&backgroundColor=0284c7",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-03&backgroundColor=0369a1",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-04&backgroundColor=9e0000",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-05&backgroundColor=60a5fa",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-06&backgroundColor=2563eb",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-07&backgroundColor=1d4ed8",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-08&backgroundColor=93c5fd",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-09&backgroundColor=7dd3fc",
    "https://api.dicebear.com/8.x/thumbs/svg?seed=toto-10&backgroundColor=3b82f6"
  ];

  // ---------- Helper ----------
  const rand = (a,b)=> Math.floor(Math.random()*(b-a+1))+a;
  const formatIDR = n => "IDR " + n.toLocaleString("en-US",{minimumFractionDigits:2, maximumFractionDigits:2});
  const mask = name => {
    const s = name.toLowerCase();
    if (s.length <= 2) return s[0]+"*";
    return s.slice(0,2) + "****" + s.slice(-1);
  };

  // --- DATA PASARAN TOTO TOGEL ---
  const togelPools = [
    {title: "Toto Togel Singapore", minWin: 500000, maxWin: 15000000},
    {title: "Toto Togel Hongkong", minWin: 800000, maxWin: 25000000},
    {title: "Toto Togel Sydney", minWin: 400000, maxWin: 12000000},
    {title: "Toto Togel Macau 5D", minWin: 1000000, maxWin: 30000000},
    {title: "Toto Togel Taiwan", minWin: 300000, maxWin: 5000000},
    {title: "Toto Togel Cambodia", minWin: 200000, maxWin: 8000000},
    {title: "Toto Togel China", minWin: 150000, maxWin: 4500000}
  ];

  const names = ["mazi","athar","lazu","niko","bima","saka","dion","raka","alva","vino","kazu","aryo","fiko","rino","reva"];

  // Generate satu record pemenang Toto Togel
  function winner() {
    const p = togelPools[rand(0, togelPools.length - 1)];
    const totalWin = rand(p.minWin, p.maxWin);
    const userImg = AVATARS[rand(0, AVATARS.length - 1)];

    return {
      name: mask(names[rand(0,names.length-1)]) + rand(0,9),
      amount: totalWin,
      game: p.title, // Nama pasaran Toto Togel
      img: userImg
    };
  }

  const track = document.getElementById('wbTrack');

  // Build initial 8 rows
  const LIST_SIZE = 8;
  for (let i=0;i<LIST_SIZE;i++){
    track.appendChild(renderItem(winner()));
  }

  // Animasi scroll 1 per 2.8 detik
  const STEP_MS = 2800;
  let itemH = null, ticking = false;
  setTimeout(()=>{ 
    if(track.children.length > 0) {
        itemH = track.children[0].offsetHeight + 10; // +gap
        cycle();
        setInterval(cycle, STEP_MS);
    }
  }, 150);

  function cycle(){
    if (ticking) return;
    ticking = true;

    const upcoming = track.children[1];
    if (upcoming) upcoming.classList.add('is-new');

    track.style.transition = "transform .6s ease";
    track.style.transform = `translateY(-${itemH}px)`;

    track.addEventListener('transitionend', onEnd, {once:true});

    function onEnd(){
      track.style.transition = "none";
      track.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
      track.appendChild(track.firstElementChild);
      
      [...track.children].forEach((li,i)=> li.classList.toggle('is-new', i===0));
      animateCount(track.children[0].querySelector('[data-amount]'));

      if (rand(0,2)===1) {
        const idx = rand(2, track.children.length-1);
        track.replaceChild(renderItem(winner()), track.children[idx]);
      }

      sprinkleCoins();
      ticking = false;
    }
  }

  function renderItem({name, amount, game, img}){
    const li = document.createElement('li');
    li.className = 'wb-item';
    li.innerHTML = `
      <img class="wb-thumb" src="${img}" alt="" style="border-radius: 50%;">
      <div>
        <div class="wb-name">${name}</div>
        <div class="wb-amount" data-amount="${amount}">${formatIDR(amount)}</div>
        <div class="wb-game" style="color: var(--ug-acc-2); font-weight: bold;">${game}</div>
      </div>
    `;
    return li;
  }

  function animateCount(el){
    if (!el) return;
    const target = +el.dataset.amount;
    let start = Math.max(10_000, Math.floor(target*0.7));
    const dur = 650, fps = 30;
    const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor((target-start)/(dur/fps)));
    const timer = setInterval(()=>{
      start += step;
      if (start >= target){ start = target; clearInterval(timer); }
      el.textContent = formatIDR(start);
    }, 1000/fps);
  }

  function sprinkleCoins(){
    const box = document.getElementById('winnerBoard');
    if (!box) return; 
    const n = rand(3,6);
    for (let i=0;i<n;i++){
      const s = document.createElement('span');
      s.className = 'wb-coin';
      s.style.left = (rand(20, box.offsetWidth-20))+'px';
      s.style.bottom = (rand(10, 40))+'px';
      s.style.setProperty('--sx', (Math.random()>.5?1:-1)*rand(6,12)+'px');
      box.appendChild(s);
      setTimeout(()=> s.remove(), 900);
    }
  }
})();
</script>

<!-- ============ WINNER LEADERBOARD - TOTO TOGEL BLUE (AUTO SCROLL) ============ -->
<style>
  :root{
    /* Deep, dark red base palette */
    --ug-deep: #1a0101;       /* near-black red */
    --ug-deeper: #0f0000;     /* maximum dark red */
    --ug-acc: #ef4444;        /* brilliant ruby red accent */
    --ug-acc-2: #b91c1c;      /* deep crimson accent */
    --line: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18);   /* subtle, warm red line */
    --glass: rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.08);  /* glassy red-tinted highlight */
    --txt: #fecaca;          /* light, pale pink text */
    --muted: #fca5a5;        /* muted warm pink text */
    /* New 3D lighting colors */
    --rim-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    --gold-acc: #facc15;      /* amber/gold for premium feel */
  }

  .wb-panel{
    width: 340px;
    background: linear-gradient(165deg, #110000 0%, var(--ug-deeper) 100%);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03); /* almost invisible true border */
    border-radius: 16px;
    color:var(--txt);
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Arial,sans-serif;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;

    /* Complex 3D-effect shadow: diffuse shadow + colored glow + sharp rim light */
    box-shadow: 
      0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 
      0 0 30px 2px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.2),
      inset 0 1px 1px 0 var(--rim-light),
      inset 0 -1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    
    /* Slight 3D tilt perspective for the whole panel */
    transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(1deg);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  .wb-panel:hover {
    transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(0deg) scale(1.01);
  }

  .wb-head{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;
    padding:14px 16px;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
    background:
      /* Top-left radial highlight for 3D depth */
      radial-gradient(100% 100% at 10% 10%, rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12), transparent 60%),
      /* Subtle overall gradient */
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03), transparent);
  }
  .wb-trophy{
    width:24px; height:24px; flex:0 0 24px;
    color:#1a0101; /* Text color inside trophy */
    
    /* 3D gradient for the trophy block */
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--ug-acc) 0%, #dc2626 40%, var(--ug-acc-2) 100%);
    border-radius:8px; display:grid; place-items:center;
    
    /* 3D shadows for the trophy block */
    box-shadow: 
      0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 
      0 0 15px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3),
      inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    
    /* Adjust SVG icon size if needed */
    font-size: 14px; 
  }
  .wb-title{ font:900 14px/1.1 system-ui; letter-spacing:.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
  .wb-dot{
    margin-left:auto; width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%;
    
    /* Multi-stage radial gradient for a spherical 3D look */
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #fff, var(--txt) 30%, var(--ug-acc) 60%, var(--ug-acc-2));
    
    /* Intense 3D glow */
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px 2px rgba(239, 68, 68, 1), inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    animation: wbPing 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes wbPing{0%,100%{transform:scale(1); opacity:1;}50%{transform:scale(1.3); opacity:0.8;}}

  .wb-list-wrap{
    height: 300px;
    overflow:hidden; position:relative;
    
    /* Adjusted mask for smoother fade */
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, #000 10%, #000 90%, transparent 100%);
            mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, #000 10%, #000 90%, transparent 100%);
    
    /* Glassy background layer */
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--glass), transparent);
  }
  .wb-track{
    list-style:none; margin:0; padding:12px 14px 14px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px;
    will-change: transform;
  }

  .wb-item{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr; gap:12px;
    padding:10px; border-radius:14px; position:relative; isolation:isolate;
    
    /* 3D appearance with shadows and subtle border */
    border:1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1);
    background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 100%);
    box-shadow: 
      0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 
      0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2),
      inset 0 1px 1px var(--rim-light);
    
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
  }
  .wb-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 
      0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 
      0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3),
      inset 0 1px 1px var(--rim-light);
  }

  .wb-thumb{ 
    width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:10px; object-fit:cover; display:block; 
    /* 3D depth for the thumbnail */
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  }
  .wb-name{ font:800 13px/1.2 system-ui; letter-spacing:.3px; margin:0 0 5px; color:var(--txt); text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
  .wb-amount{ 
    font:900 14px/1 system-ui; color:var(--ug-acc); 
    /* Crimson glow text effect */
    text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4); 
  }
  .wb-game{ font:600 12px/1.3 system-ui; color:var(--muted); margin-top:5px; opacity:.9; }

  /* Premium 'is-new' item styling with gold and intense red glow */
  .wb-item.is-new{
    background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.08) 0%, rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.02) 100%);
    border: 1px solid rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.3); /* gold border */
    box-shadow:
      0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 
      0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),
      0 0 30px 5px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3), /* intense red glow */
      inset 0 1px 1px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.2); /* gold inner lighting */
    
    transform: translateZ(0);
    animation: wbPulse 1.5s ease both;
  }
  .wb-item.is-new .wb-name { color: #fff; }
  .wb-item.is-new .wb-amount { color: var(--gold-acc); text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.5); }
  .wb-item.is-new .wb-game { color: #fef08a; } /* pale gold */

  @keyframes wbPulse{
    0%{ filter:saturate(1); transform: scale(1) translateZ(0); }
    40%{ filter:saturate(1.2) contrast(1.1); transform: scale(1.02) translateZ(0); }
    100%{ filter:saturate(1.05); transform: scale(1) translateZ(0); }
  }

  /* Red coin/spark effect */
  .wb-coin{
    position:absolute; width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:50%;
    /* 3D spherical gradient with gold and red */
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #fff, #fef08a 20%, var(--gold-acc) 50%, var(--ug-acc) 80%, var(--ug-acc-2));
    
    /* Red glow for spark */
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px 2px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.7), inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    pointer-events:none; z-index:5;
    animation: coinPop 1s ease-out forwards;
  }
  @keyframes coinPop{
    0%{ transform:translate(var(--sx,0), 14px) scale(.6) rotate(0); opacity:.95; }
    70%{ transform:translate(calc(var(--sx,0)*1.3), -25px) scale(1.1) rotate(180deg); opacity:1; }
    100%{ transform:translate(calc(var(--sx,0)*2.2), -45px) scale(.9) rotate(360deg); opacity:0; }
  }

  /* Thin, elegant Footer */
  .wb-foot{
    border-top:1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
    padding:10px 14px; font:600 12px/1.3 system-ui; color:#fecaca; display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }
  .wb-pill{
    margin-left:auto; 
    border:1px solid rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.4); /* gold border */
    color:#1a0101;
    
    /* 3D gold/red gradient pill */
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-acc) 0%, #eab308 50%, #ca8a04 100%);
    
    border-radius:999px; font:800 11px/1 system-ui; padding:7px 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    
    /* 3D shadows and glow for pill */
    box-shadow: 
      0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 
      0 0 15px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.2),
      inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
  }
  .wb-pill:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 
      0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 
      0 0 20px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.3),
      inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }

  @media (max-width:480px){
    .wb-panel{ width: 94vw; border-radius: 12px; }
    .wb-head { padding: 12px; }
    .wb-track { padding: 10px; gap: 10px; }
    .wb-item { grid-template-columns: 48px 1fr; gap: 10px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 12px; }
    .wb-thumb { width: 48px; height: 48px; }
    .wb-foot { padding: 8px 10px; }
  }
</style>
                    </div>
 
            
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</style>

        border-top-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
        transform: translateX(8px) translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 
            0 20px 38px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55), 
            0 0 25px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25);
    }

    }

    /* Active State (Ketika FAQ Terbuka) */
    .faq-item.active {
        border-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.45);
        box-shadow: 
            0 15px 35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),

        box-shadow:

            inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
        font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Accordion Content Smooth Transition */
    .faq-answer {
        max-height: 0;

        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.08), transparent);

    .faq-item.active .faq-answer {

            padding: 25px;
        }

        .faq-item:hover {
            transform: translateX(4px);
        }
    }
</style>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');
        faqItems.forEach(item => {
            const question = item.querySelector('.faq-question');
            question.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const isActive = item.classList.contains('active');
                
                // Menutup item FAQ lain yang sedang terbuka (efek true accordion)
                faqItems.forEach(otherItem => {
                    otherItem.classList.remove('active');
                });
                
                // Jika item yang diklik sebelumnya tidak aktif, buka sekarang
                if (!isActive) {
                    item.classList.add('active');
                }
            });
        });
    });
</script>

    /* Lift up effect with brilliant shadow explosion */
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow:
        0 12px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
        0 0 25px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3),
        inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
}

/* === ANSWER BOX (3D Shadow Recess) === */
.cok-faq-a {
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;

    /* Inverted metallic shading for "sunken" depth look */
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        #0f0000 0%,
        #1c0202 35%,
        #290404 70%,
        #0f0000 100%
    );

    color: #fca5a5; /* Warm readable pink-red text */
    margin-top: -6px;
    border-radius: 0 0 16px 16px;
    padding: 0 22px;

    /* Deep glass borders */
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18);
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18);

    transition: max-height 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), padding 0.3s ease;

    box-shadow:
        inset 0 10px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), /* Deep shadow transition from question box */
        inset 0 0 15px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.05);
}

.cok-faq-a.open {
    max-height: 600px; /* Dipertinggi sedikit agar tidak memotong teks panjang */
    padding: 18px 22px;
}

/* === RESPONSIVE === */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .cok-faq-title { font-size: 26px; }
    .cok-faq-title2 { font-size: 30px; }
    .cok-faq-title3 { font-size: 24px; }
    .cok-faq-q { padding: 14px 18px; font-size: 16px; }
    .cok-faq-a.open { padding: 14px 18px; }
}
</style>
<!-- ========================= JS ========================= -->

<script>
document.querySelectorAll(".cok-faq-q").forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    let answer = btn.nextElementSibling;
    answer.classList.toggle("open");
  });
});
</script>

<style type="text/css">
/* ==================== TOTO80 FIXED FOOTER ==================== */
.TOTO80-fixed-footer {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-around;
    position: fixed;

    /* Deep 3D Cylindrical Dark Red Reflection */
    background: linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        #240303 0%,
        #0f0000 50%,
        #050000 100%
    );

    padding: 6px 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    z-index: 99;

    /* Smooth 3D Curved Edge Design */
    border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0;
    border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25);
    border-top: 2px solid #ef4444; /* Brilliant ruby top rim light */

    box-shadow:
        0 -10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
        0 -2px 15px rgba(185, 28, 28, 0.25),
        inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

.TOTO80-fixed-footer a {
    flex-basis: calc((100% - 15px * 6) / 5);
    text-decoration: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    color: #fca5a5; /* Elegant soft pink-red text */
    max-width: 75px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: 'Poppins', Ubuntu, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.TOTO80-fixed-footer a:hover {
    color: #ffffff;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.6);
}

/* 3D Floating Central Action Button */
.TOTO80-fixed-footer .center {
    transform: scale(1.4) translateY(-8px);
    background: center no-repeat;
    background-size: contain;
    background-color: inherit;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    box-shadow: 
        0 10px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),
        0 0 15px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
}

/* Mengoreksi typo selector lama dan menyelaraskan ke brand baru */
.TOTO80-fixed-footer img {
    max-width: 22px;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
    max-height: 22px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
}


/* ==================== TOTO80 INFINITE SLIDER TESTIMONIAL ==================== */
.TOTO80-testi-wrap {
    padding: 30px 0;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.TOTO80-slider {
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    /* Soft shading on edges for depth perception */
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, #000 8%, #000 92%, transparent 100%);
            mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, #000 8%, #000 92%, transparent 100%);
}

.TOTO80-track {
    display: flex;
    gap: 20px;
    width: max-content;
    animation: mawartotoslide 30s linear infinite;
    will-change: transform;
}

.TOTO80-slider:hover .TOTO80-track {
    animation-play-state: paused;
}

/* 3D Glassmorphic Testimonial Card */
.TOTO80-card {
    min-width: 320px;
    max-width: 320px;

    background: linear-gradient(
        145deg,
        #1c0202,
        #0f0000
    );

    backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(160%);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(160%);

    border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); /* Highlight edge */

    padding: 24px;
    border-radius: 22px;

    box-shadow:
        0 12px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
        inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02),
        inset 0 0 15px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.03);

    transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.4s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease;
}

/* Hover effect lifting up dramatically in 3D Space */
.TOTO80-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.02);
    border-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.45);
    border-top-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);

    box-shadow:
        0 25px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
        0 0 30px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25);
}

.TOTO80-top {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
}

/* Spherical 3D Ball Avatar Globe */
.avatar {
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    border-radius: 50%;

    background: radial-gradient(
        circle at 30% 30%,
        #ff8585 0%,
        #ef4444 55%,
        #991b1b 100__%
    );

    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #fff;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);

    box-shadow:
        0 6px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
        0 0 15px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.35);
}

.TOTO80-top h3 {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #ffffff;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}

.TOTO80-top span {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #fca5a5; /* Soft readable crimson accent */
    display: block;
    margin-top: 2px;
}

.TOTO80-card p {
    line-height: 1.7;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #fee2e2;
    margin: 0;
    text-align: justify;
}

/* Premium Gold Stars Contrast */
.stars {
    margin-top: 14px;
    color: #facc15; /* Golden Yellow for high contrast premium styling */
    font-size: 16px;
    text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.5);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
}

/* Smooth Scrolling Infinite Loop Animation */
@keyframes mawartotoslide {
    0% {
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
    100% {
        transform: translateX(-50%);
    }
}
</style>

<style>
#rose-petals {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    overflow: hidden;
    z-index: 50;
}

/* Base Kelopak Mawar Merah */
.rose-petal {
    position: absolute;
    /* Membuat bentuk kelopak mawar organik menggunakan border-radius asimetris */
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d31027 0%, #8f0615 100%);
    border-radius: 0% 100% 40% 100% / 0% 100% 40% 100%;
    
    opacity: 0.85;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3));
    /* Animasi jatuh dikombinasikan dengan goyangan meliuk-liuk */
    animation: fallAndSway linear infinite;
}

/* Variasi ukuran kelopak mawar biar tampak natural */
.rose-petal.sm { 
    width: 10px; 
    height: 12px; 
    opacity: 0.7;
}
.rose-petal.md { 
    width: 16px; 
    height: 18px; 
    opacity: 0.85;
}
.rose-petal.lg { 
    width: 24px; 
    height: 26px; 
    opacity: 0.95;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 6px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4));
}

/* Animasi Jatuh Sekaligus Meliuk & Berputar 3D */
@keyframes fallAndSway {
    0% {
        transform: translateY(-10vh) translateX(0) rotate(0deg) rotateY(0deg);
    }
    30% {
        /* Kelopak meliuk ke kanan dan agak membalik */
        transform: translateY(30vh) translateX(30px) rotate(45deg) rotateY(180deg);
    }
    65% {
        /* Kelopak meliuk ke kiri */
        transform: translateY(70vh) translateX(-25px) rotate(110deg) rotateY(0deg);
    }
    100% {
        /* Kelopak mawar sampai ke bawah layar */
        transform: translateY(110vh) translateX(15px) rotate(220deg) rotateY(360deg);
    }
}
</style>

<div id="rose-petals"></div>

<script>
(function(){
    const container = document.getElementById('rose-petals');
    // Jumlah kelopak: 20 di HP agar ringan, 45 di Desktop agar estetik
    const COUNT = window.innerWidth < 768 ? 20 : 45;

    for(let i = 0; i < COUNT; i++){
        const petal = document.createElement('div');
        const rand = Math.random();
        
        // Membagi variasi ukuran kelopak mawar (Kecil, Sedang, Besar)
        if (rand < 0.3) {
            petal.className = 'rose-petal sm';
        } else if (rand < 0.75) {
            petal.className = 'rose-petal md';
        } else {
            petal.className = 'rose-petal lg';
        }

        // Mengatur posisi acak di layar
        petal.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
        
        // Mengatur durasi jatuh (kelopak besar jatuh sedikit lebih cepat daripada yang kecil)
        const baseSpeed = rand < 0.3 ? 9 : (rand < 0.75 ? 7 : 6);
        petal.style.animationDuration = (baseSpeed + Math.random() * 5) + 's';
        
        // Delay kemunculan agar tidak jatuh berbarengan secara kaku
        petal.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 8 + 's';

        container.appendChild(petal);
    }
})();
</script>
           
</script>
